G1668.def: probably from G1670 (ἑλκύω); an ulcer (as if drawn together)

G1719.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5401 (φόβος); in fear, i.e. alarmed

G5239.def: from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and G1614 (ἐκτείνω); to extend inordinately

G3610.def: from G3611 (οἰκέω); a fellow resident, i.e. menial domestic

G3148.def: probably from the base of G3145 (μασσάομαι) (through the idea of contact); a whip (literally, the Roman flagellum for criminals; figuratively, a disease)

G3380.def: from G3361 (μή) and G4452 (-πω); not yet

G3433.def: probably by variation for G3425 (μόγις); with difficulty

G4818.def: from G4862 (σύν) and G3076 (λυπέω); to afflict jointly, i.e. (passive) sorrow at (on account of) someone

G2276.def: neuter of comparative of (slightly) used for that of G2556 (κακός); worse (as noun); by implication, less (as adverb)

G4947.def: probably of Hebrew origin (H06865); Syria (i.e. Tsyria or Tyre), a region of Asia

G5280.def: from G5279 (ὑπομιμνήσκω); a reminding or (reflexively) recollection

G2738.def: from G2545 (καίω); properly, a burn (concretely), but used (abstractly) of a glow

G4190.def: from a derivative of G4192 (πόνος); hurtful, i.e. evil (properly, in effect or influence, and thus differing from G2556 (κακός), which refers rather to essential character, as well as from G4550 (σαπρός), which indicates degeneracy from original virtue); figuratively, calamitous; also (passively) ill, i.e. diseased; but especially (morally) culpable, i.e. derelict, vicious, facinorous; neuter (singular) mischief, malice, or (plural) guilt; masculine (singular) the devil, or (plural) sinners
G4190.kjv: bad, evil, grievous, harm, lewd, malicious, wicked(-ness)

G5368.def: from G5384 (φίλος); to be a friend to (fond of (an individual or an object)), i.e. have affection for (denoting personal attachment, as a matter of sentiment or feeling; while G25 (ἀγαπάω) is wider, embracing especially the judgment and the deliberate assent of the will as a matter of principle, duty and propriety: the two thus stand related very much as G2309 (θέλω) and G1014 (βούλομαι), or as G2372 (θυμός) and G3563 (νοῦς) respectively; the former being chiefly of the heart and the latter of the head); specially, to kiss (as a mark of tenderness)

G1033.def: from the base of G977 (βιβρώσκω); food (literally or figuratively), especially (ceremonially) articles allowed or forbidden by the Jewish law

G243.def: a primary word; "else," i.e. different (in many applications)

G1319.def: from G1320 (διδάσκαλος); instruction (the function or the information)

G1277.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4126 (πλέω); to sail through

G4319.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G154 (αἰτέω); to ask repeatedly (importune), i.e. solicit

G2727.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2279 (ἦχος); to sound down into the ears, i.e. (by implication) to indoctrinate ("catechize") or (genitive case) to apprise of

G4247.def: feminine of G4246 (πρεσβύτης); an old woman

G3361.def: a primary particle of qualified negation (whereas G3756 (οὐ) expresses an absolute denial); (adverb) not, (conjunction) lest; also (as an interrogative implying a negative answer (whereas G3756 (οὐ) expects an affirmative one)) whether
G3361.kjv: any but (that), X forbear, + God forbid, + lack, lest, neither, never, no (X wise in), none, nor, (can-)not, nothing, that not, un(-taken), without

G281.def: of Hebrew origin (H0543); properly, firm, i.e. (figuratively) trustworthy; adverbially, surely (often as interjection, so be it)

G3504.def: from G3501 (νέος) and a derivative of G5453 (φύω); newly planted, i.e. (figuratively) a young convert ("neophyte")

G2151.def: from G2152 (εὐσεβής); to be pious, i.e. (towards God) to worship, or (towards parents) to respect (support)

G2508.def: from G2513 (καθαρός); to cleanse, i.e. (specially) to prune; figuratively, to expiate

G4933.def: from G4862 (σύν) and G5083 (τηρέω); to keep closely together, i.e. (by implication) to conserve (from ruin); mentally, to remember (and obey)

G3952.def: from the present participle of G3918 (πάρειμι); a being near, i.e. advent (often, return; specially, of Christ to punish Jerusalem, or finally the wicked); (by implication) physically, aspect

G618.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to receive (specially, in full, or as a host); also to take aside

G638.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4155 (πνίγω); to stifle (by drowning or overgrowth)

G1492.def: a primary verb; used only in certain past tenses, the others being borrowed from the equivalent G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) and G3708 (ὁράω); properly, to see (literally or figuratively); by implication, (in the perfect tense only) to know
G1492.kjv: be aware, behold, X can (+ not tell), consider, (have) know(-ledge), look (on), perceive, see, be sure, tell, understand, wish, wot

G4067.def: from a comparative of G4012 (περί) and (to rub); something brushed all around, i.e. off-scrapings (figuratively, scum)

G1989.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4724 (στέλλω); to enjoin (by writing), i.e. (genitive case) to communicate by letter (for any purpose)

G183.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2722 (κατέχω); unrestrainable

G5083.def: from (a watch; perhaps akin to G2334 (θεωρέω)); to guard (from loss or injury, properly, by keeping the eye upon; and thus differing from G5442 (φυλάσσω), which is properly to prevent escaping; and from G2892 (κουστωδία), which implies a fortress or full military lines of apparatus), i.e. to note (a prophecy; figuratively, to fulfil a command); by implication, to detain (in custody; figuratively, to maintain); by extension, to withhold (for personal ends; figuratively, to keep unmarried); by extension, to withhold (for personal ends; figuratively, to keep unmarried)
G5083.kjv: hold fast, keep(- er), (pre-, re-)serve, watch

G982.def: from a derivative of G980 (βιόω); relating to the present existence
G982.kjv: of (pertaining to, things that pertain to) this life

G3750.def: from a derivative of G3605 (ὄζω); smell (the sense)

G1517.def: from G1518 (εἰρηνοποιός); to be a peace-maker, i.e. (figuratively) to harmonize

G2364.def: apparently a primary word (compare "daughter"); a female child, or (by Hebraism) descendant (or inhabitant)

G2899.def: of uncertain derivation; a margin, i.e. (specially), a fringe or tassel

G1406.def: from G1405 (δράσσομαι); a drachma or (silver) coin (as handled)

G4283.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G2097 (εὐαγγελίζω); to announce glad news in advance

G948.def: from a (presumed) derivative of (to stink); to be disgusted, i.e. (by implication) detest (especially of idolatry)

G3531.def: from G3532 (Νικόλαος); a Nicolaite, i.e. adherent of Nicolaus

G5362.def: from G5384 (φίλος) and G435 (ἀνήρ); fond of man, i.e. affectionate as a wife

G4019.def: from G4012 (περί) and G1210 (δέω); to bind around one, i.e. enwrap

G5000.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H06646); the gazelle; Tabitha (i.e. Tabjetha), a Christian female

G4665.def: of uncertain derivation; the emerald or green gem so called

G3164.def: middle voice of an apparently primary verb; to war, i.e. (figuratively) to quarrel, dispute

G4102.def: from G3982 (πείθω); persuasion, i.e. credence; moral conviction (of religious truth, or the truthfulness of God or a religious teacher), especially reliance upon Christ for salvation; abstractly, constancy in such profession; by extension, the system of religious (Gospel) truth itself

G3979.def: dative case feminine of a derivative of G4228 (πούς) (as adverb); foot-wise, i.e. by walking

G3346.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G5087 (τίθημι); to transfer, i.e. (literally) transport, (by implication) exchange, (reflexively) change sides, or (figuratively) pervert
G3346.kjv: carry over, change, remove, translate, turn

G4149.def: from the base of G4130 (πλήθω); wealth (as fulness), i.e. (literally) money, possessions, or (figuratively) abundance, richness, (specially), valuable bestowment

G3002.def: of uncertain origin; Lebbæus, a Christian

G4303.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3143 (μαρτύρομαι); to be a witness in advance i.e. predict

G5495.def: perhaps from the base of G5494 (χειμών) in the sense of its congener the base of G5490 (χάσμα) (through the idea of hollowness for grasping); the hand (literally or figuratively (power); especially (by Hebraism) a means or instrument)

G1889.def: contracted from G1891 (Ἐπαφρόδιτος); Epaphras, a Christian

G226.def: from G227 (ἀληθής); to be true (in doctrine and profession)

G3560.def: from the same as G3559 (νουθεσία); to put in mind, i.e. (by implication) to caution or reprove gently

G4071.def: neuter of a derivative of G4072 (πέτομαι); a flying animal, i.e. bird

G435.def: a primary word (compare G444 (ἄνθρωπος)); a man (properly as an individual male)

G500.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G5547 (Χριστός); an opponent of the Messiah

G3781.def: from G3784 (ὀφείλω); an ower, i.e. person indebted; figuratively, a delinquent; morally, a transgressor (against God)

G581.def: past participle of a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G1096 (γίνομαι); absent, i.e. deceased (figuratively, renounced)

G4260.def: from G4253 (πρό) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to walk forward, i.e. advance (literally, or in years)
G4260.kjv: + be of a great age, go farther (on), be well stricken

G1683.def: genitive case compound of G1700 (ἐμοῦ) and G846 (αὐτός); of myself so likewise the dative case , and accusative case

G5348.def: apparently a primary verb; to be beforehand, i.e. anticipate or precede; by extension, to have arrived at

G1251.def: middle voice from G1223 (διά) and G191 (ἀκούω); to hear throughout, i.e. patiently listen (to a prisoner's plea)

G4454.def: apparently a primary word; a "foal" or "filly", i.e. (specially), a young ass

G3995.def: of uncertain affinity; a wife's father

G4768.def: from the same as G4767 (στυγνητός); to render gloomy, i.e. (by implication) glower (be overcast with clouds, or sombreness of speech)

G69.def: ultimately from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G5258 (ὕπνος); to be sleepless, i.e. keep awake

G4322.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G378 (ἀναπληρόω); to fill up further, i.e. furnish fully

G299.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3470 (μῶμος); unblemished (literally or figuratively)
G299.kjv: without blame (blemish, fault, spot), faultless, unblamable

G3011.def: from a derivative of G2992 (λαός) and G2041 (ἔργον); a public servant, i.e. a functionary in the Temple or Gospel, or (genitive case) a worshipper (of God) or benefactor (of man)

G5254.def: from G5259 (ὑπό) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold oneself under, i.e. endure with patience

G3425.def: adverb from a primary (toil); with difficulty

G138.def: probably akin to G142 (αἴρω); to take for oneself, i.e. to prefer

G377.def: from G303 (ἀνά) and G4098 (πίπτω); to fall back, i.e. lie down, lean back

G3157.def: of Hebrew origin (H04977); Matthan (i.e. Mattan), an Israelite

G1829.def: from a comparative of G1537 (ἐκ) and a presumed (to spue); vomit, i.e. food disgorged

G4159.def: from the base of G4213 (πόσις) with enclitic adverb of origin; from which (as interrogative) or what (as relative) place, state, source or cause

G5594.def: a primary verb; to breathe (voluntarily but gently, thus differing on the one hand from G4154 (πνέω), which denotes properly a forcible respiration; and on the other from the base of G109 (ἀήρ), which refers properly to an inanimate breeze), i.e. (by implication, of reduction of temperature by evaporation) to chill (figuratively)

G3622.def: from G3623 (οἰκονόμος); administration (of a household or estate); specially, a (religious) "economy"

G2811.def: from a shorter form of G2564 (καλέω); renown (as if being called)

G1452.def: neuter of the comparative of G1451 (ἐγγύς); nearer

G1140.def: neuter of a derivative of G1142 (δαίμων); a dæmonic being; by extension a deity

G3792.def: from G3793 (ὄχλος) and G4160 (ποιέω); to make a crowd, i.e. raise a public disturbance

G3650.def: a primary word; "whole" or "all", i.e. complete (in extent, amount, time or degree), especially (neuter) as noun or adverb
G3650.kjv: all, altogether, every whit, + throughout, whole

G3146.def: from G3148 (μάστιξ); to flog (literally or figuratively)

G245.def: from G243 (ἄλλος); another's, i.e. not one's own; by extension foreign, not akin, hostile

G3643.def: from a compound of G3641 (ὀλίγος) and ("care"); to have little regard for, i.e. to disesteem

G4330.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G1439 (ἐάω); to permit further progress

G2173.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G5543 (χρηστός); easily used, i.e. useful

G3386.def: from G3385 (μήτι) and G1065 (γέ); not at all then, i.e. not to say (the rather still)

G4012.def: from the base of G4008 (πέραν); properly, through (all over), i.e. around; figuratively with respect to; used in various applications, of place, cause or time (with the genitive case denoting the subject or occasion or superlative point; with the accusative case the locality, circuit, matter, circumstance or general period)
G4012.kjv: (there-)about, above, against, at, on behalf of, X and his company, which concern, (as) concerning, for, X how it will go with, ((there-, where-)) of, on, over, pertaining (to), for sake, X (e-)state, (as) touching, (where-)by (in), with

G1001.def: from G1002 (βολίς); to heave the lead

G2601.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of the base of G939 (βάσις); to cause to go down, i.e. precipitate

G2638.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to take eagerly, i.e. seize, possess, etc. (literally or figuratively)
G2638.kjv: apprehend, attain, come upon, comprehend, find, obtain, perceive, (over-)take

G2679.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4626 (σκάπτω); to undermine, i.e. (by implication) destroy

G5612.def: middle voice of an apparently primary verb; to "roar"

G796.def: from G797 (ἀστράπτω); lightning; by analogy, glare

G2012.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5158 (τρόπος) (in the sense of G2011 (ἐπιτροπή)); a commissioner, i.e. domestic manager, guardian

G1458.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2564 (καλέω); to call in (as a debt or demand), i.e. bring to account (charge, criminate, etc.)
G1458.kjv: accuse, call in question, implead, lay to the charge

G4453.def: probably ultimately from (to be busy, to trade); to barter (as a pedlar), i.e. to sell

G2383.def: of Hebrew origin (H02971); Jairus (i.e. Jair), an Israelite

G3642.def: from G3641 (ὀλίγος) and G6590; little-spirited, i.e. faint-hearted

G1073.def: a primary verb; to swell out, i.e. be full

G2210.def: from G2209 (ζημία); to injure, i.e. (reflexively or passively) to experience detriment
G2210.kjv: be cast away, receive damage, lose, suffer loss

G4934.def: middle voice from G4862 (σύν) and G5087 (τίθημι); to place jointly, i.e. (figuratively) to consent (bargain, stipulate), concur

G2421.def: of Hebrew origin (H03448); Jessæ (i.e. Jishai), an Israelite

G851.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G138 (αἱρέομαι); to remove (literally or figuratively)

G601.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2572 (καλύπτω); to take off the cover, i.e. disclose

G1330.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι); to traverse (literally)
G1330.kjv: come, depart, go (about, abroad, everywhere, over, through, throughout), pass (by, over, through, throughout), pierce through, travel, walk through

G4883.def: from G4862 (σύν) and a derivative of a compound of G719 (ἁρμός) and G3004 (λέγω) (in its original sense of laying); to render close-jointed together, i.e. organize compactly

G5569.def: from G5571 (ψευδής) and G80 (ἀδελφός); a spurious brother, i.e. pretended associate

G2724.def: from G2725 (κατήγορος); a complaint ("category"), i.e. criminal charge

G5339.def: of uncertain affinity; to be chary of, i.e. (subjectively) to abstain or (objectively) to treat leniently

G4628.def: apparently from (to parch; through the idea of leanness); the leg (as lank)

G4502.def: of Hebrew origin (H07205); Ruben (i.e. Reuben), an Israelite

G2639.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3004 (λέγω) (in its original meaning); to lay down, i.e. (figuratively) to enrol

G5511.def: of uncertain derivation; a military cloak

G2934.def: from G2932 (κτάομαι); property, i.e. (specially) a domestic animal

G294.def: from the base of G297 (ἀμφότερος) and (to invest); to enrobe

G53.def: from the same as G40 (ἅγιος); properly, clean, i.e. (figuratively) innocent, modest, perfect

G729.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of the same as G4476 (ῥαφίς); unsewed, i.e. of a single piece

G1394.def: from the base of G1325 (δίδωμι); a giving; by implication, (concretely) a gift

G4782.def: from G4862 (σύν) and G2597 (καταβαίνω); to descend in company with

G259.def: from a collateral form of G138 (αἱρέομαι); capture, be taken.

G255.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G3081 (λυσιτελεῖ); gainless, i.e. (by implication) pernicious

G4073.def: feminine of the same as G4074 (Πέτρος); a (mass of) rock (literally or figuratively)

G1388.def: from an obsolete primary verb, (probably meaning to decoy; compare G1185 (δελεάζω)); a trick (bait), i.e. (figuratively) wile

G189.def: from G191 (ἀκούω); hearing (the act, the sense or the thing heard)
G189.kjv: audience, ear, fame, which ye heard, hearing, preached, report, rumor

G2983.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb, which is use only as an alternate in certain tenses; to take (in very many applications, literally and figuratively (properly objective or active, to get hold of; whereas G1209 (δέχομαι) is rather subjective or passive, to have offered to one; while G138 (αἱρέομαι) is more violent, to seize or remove))
G2983.kjv: accept, + be amazed, assay, attain, bring, X when I call, catch, come on (X unto), + forget, have, hold, obtain, receive (X after), take (away, up)

G964.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H01004 and H02617); house of kindness; Beth-esda, a pool in Jerusalem

G1709.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4154 (πνέω); to inhale, i.e. (figuratively) to be animated by (bent upon)

G2773.def: from a derivative of G2772 (κέρμα); a handler of coins, i.e. money-broker

G2458.def: of Latin origin; Junias, a Christian

G635.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4105 (πλανάω); to lead astray (figuratively); passively, to stray (from truth)

G2760.def: of Latin origin; a centurion, i.e. captain of one hundred soldiers

G5426.def: from G5424 (φρήν); to exercise the mind, i.e. entertain or have a sentiment or opinion; by implication, to be (mentally) disposed (more or less earnestly in a certain direction); intensively, to interest oneself in (with concern or obedience)
G5426.kjv: set the affection on, (be) care(-ful), (be like-, + be of one, + be of the same, + let this) mind(-ed), regard, savour, think

G2917.def: from G2919 (κρίνω); a decision (the function or the effect, for or against ("crime"))
G2917.kjv: avenge, condemned, condemnation, damnation, + go to law, judgment

G2519.def: from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and G2233 (ἡγέομαι); a guide, i.e. (figuratively) a teacher

G2212.def: of uncertain affinity; to seek (literally or figuratively); specially, (by Hebraism) to worship (God), or (in a bad sense) to plot (against life)
G2212.kjv: be (go) about, desire, endeavour, enquire (for), require, (X will) seek (after, for, means)

G4179.def: from G4183 (πολύς) and probably a derivative of G4120 (πλέκω); manifold, i.e. (neuter as noun) very much more

G2010.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G5157 (τροπή); to turn over (transfer), i.e. allow
G2010.kjv: give leave (liberty, license), let, permit, suffer

G4859.def: from G4862 (σύν) and G5456 (φωνή); sounding together (alike), i.e. (figuratively) accordant (neuter as noun, agreement)

G2410.def: of Hebrew origin (H03405); Jericho, a place in Palestine

G4413.def: contracted superlative of G4253 (πρό); foremost (in time, place, order or importance)
G4413.kjv: before, beginning, best, chief(-est), first (of all), former

G5403.def: from G5404 (φοῖνιξ); palm-country; Phœnice (or Phœnicia), a region of Palestine

G4983.def: from G4982 (σώζω); the body (as a sound whole), used in a very wide application, literally or figuratively

G4605.def: of Hebrew origin (H06721); Sidon (i.e. Tsidon), a place in Palestine

G5150.def: neuter of a compound of G5140 (τρεῖς) and G3376 (μήν) as noun; a three months' space

G2880.def: a primary verb; to cram, i.e. glut or sate

G1687.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and a presumed derivative of the base of G939 (βάσις); equivalent to G1684 (ἐμβαίνω); to intrude on (figuratively)

G261.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3129 (μανθάνω); ignorant

G1918.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G1062 (γάμος); to form affinity with, i.e. (specially) in a levirate way

G3016.def: neuter of a derivative of the same as G3013 (λεπίς); something scaled (light), i.e. a small coin

G758.def: present participle of G757 (ἄρχω); a first (in rank or power)

G3845.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to go contrary to, i.e. violate a command

G3594.def: from G3595 (ὁδηγός); to show the way (literally or figuratively (teach))

G447.def: from G303 (ἀνά) and (to send); to let up, i.e. (literally) slacken or (figuratively) desert, desist from

G4663.def: of uncertain derivation; a grub, maggot or earth-worm

G1367.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G5507 (χίλιοι); two thousand

G240.def: Genitive plural from G243 (ἄλλος) reduplicated; one another
G240.kjv: each other, mutual, one another, (the other), (them-, your-)selves, (selves) together (sometimes with G3326 (μετά) or G4314 (πρός))

G4907.def: from G4920 (συνίημι); a mental putting together, i.e. intelligence or (concretely) the intellect

G1476.def: from a derivative of (to sit); sedentary, i.e. (by implication) immovable

G3304.def: from G3203 and G3767 (οὖν) and G1065 (γέ); so then at least

G706.def: from G142 (αἴρω); a number (as reckoned up)

G1188.def: from G1209 (δέχομαι); the right side or (feminine) hand (as that which usually takes)

G2802.def: of uncertain derivation; Claude, an island near Crete

G4875.def: middle from G4862 (σύν) and G373 (ἀναπαύω); to recruit oneself in company with

G3533.def: from G3534 (νῖκος) and G4172 (πόλις); victorious city; Nicopolis, a place in Macedonia

G1151.def: probably from the base of G1150 (δαμάζω); a heifer (as tame)

G156.def: from the same as G154 (αἰτέω); a cause (as if asked for), i.e. (logical) reason (motive, matter), (legal) crime (alleged or proved)

G4097.def: contracted from (to traverse; from the base of G4008 (πέραν)); to traffic (by travelling), i.e. dispose of as merchandise or into slavery (literally or figuratively)

G1429.def: from G1427 (δώδεκα) and G5443 (φυλή); the commonwealth of Israel

G5449.def: from G5453 (φύω); growth (by germination or expansion), i.e. (by implication) natural production (lineal descent); by extension, a genus or sort; figuratively, native disposition, constitution or usage

G2443.def: probably from the same as the former part of G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ) (through the demonstrative idea; compare G3588 (ὁ)); in order that (denoting the purpose or the result)

G4267.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1097 (γινώσκω); to know beforehand, i.e. foresee

G3983.def: from the same as G3993 (πένης) (through the idea of pinching toil; "pine"); to famish (absolutely or comparatively); figuratively, to crave

G1993.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4750 (στόμα); to put something over the mouth, i.e. (figuratively) to silence

G3938.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3598 (ὁδός); a by-road, i.e. (actively) a route

G3423.def: from a derivative of G3415 (μνάομαι); to give a souvenir (engagement present), i.e. betroth

G5384.def: properly, dear, i.e. a friend; actively, fond, i.e. friendly (still as a noun, an associate, neighbor, etc.)

G4601.def: from G4602 (σιγή); to keep silent (transitively or intransitively)

G2856.def: from a derivative of the base of G2849 (κολάζω); to dock, i.e. (figuratively) abridge

G856.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); a place of sitting apart, i.e. a privy

G179.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2647 (καταλύω); indissoluble, i.e. (figuratively) permanent

G862.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5351 (φθείρω); undecaying (in essence or continuance)

G5478.def: from G5477 (Χαναάν); a Chanaanæan (i.e. Kenaanite), or native of gentile Palestine

G5602.def: from an adverb form of G3592 (ὅδε); in this same spot, i.e. here or hither

G1632.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and (to pour); to pour forth; figuratively, to bestow

G246.def: from G243 (ἄλλος) and G5443 (φυλή); foreign, i.e. (specially) Gentile

G915.def: of uncertain derivation; a foreigner (i.e. non-Greek)

G591.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to give away, i.e. up, over, back, etc. (in various applications)
G591.kjv: deliver (again), give (again), (re-)pay(-ment be made), perform, recompense, render, requite, restore, reward, sell, yield

G510.def: from G511 (ἀνώτερος); superior, i.e. (locally) more remote

G1741.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1391 (δόξα); in glory, i.e. splendid, (figuratively) noble

G1724.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G251 (ἅλς); in the sea, i.e. marine

G5479.def: from G5463 (χαίρω); cheerfulness, i.e. calm delight
G5479.kjv: gladness, X greatly, (X be exceeding) joy(-ful, -fully, -fulness, -ous)

G2283.def: of Hebrew origin (H08559); Thamar (i.e. Tamar), an Israelitess

G5237.def: from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and G1492 (εἴδω); to overlook, i.e. not punish

G3520.def: probably from the base of G3491 (ναῦς); an island

G1796.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5195 (ὑβρίζω); to insult

G4989.def: prolongation for G4986 (Σώπατρος); Sosipatrus, a Christian

G5616.def: from G5613 (ὡς) and G1487 (εἰ); as if
G5616.kjv: about, as (it had been, it were), like (as)

G5423.def: from G5424 (φρήν) and G539 (ἀπάτη); a mind-misleader, i.e. seducer

G4183.def: including the forms from the alternate ; (singular) much (in any respect) or (plural) many; neuter (singular) as adverbial, largely; neuter (plural) as adverb or noun often, mostly, largely
G4183.kjv: abundant, + altogether, common, + far (passed, spent), (+ be of a) great (age, deal, -ly, while), long, many, much, oft(-en (-times)), plenteous, sore, straitly

G2599.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G916 (βαρέω); to impose upon

G4602.def: apparently from (to hiss, i.e. hist or hush); silence

G3506.def: apparently a primary verb; to "nod", i.e. (by analogy), signal

G1812.def: plural ordinal from G1803 (ἕξ) and G1540 (ἑκατόν); six hundred

G3849.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G971 (βιάζω); to force contrary to (nature), i.e. compel (by entreaty)

G3596.def: from a compound of G3598 (ὁδός) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to be a wayfarer, i.e. travel

G876.def: apparently a primary word; froth, i.e. slaver

G3710.def: from G3709 (ὀργή); to provoke or enrage, i.e. (passively) become exasperated

G1060.def: from G1062 (γάμος); to wed (of either sex)

G4122.def: from G4123 (πλεονέκτης); to be covetous, i.e. (by implication) to over-reach
G4122.kjv: get an advantage, defraud, make a gain

G5025.def: dative case and accusative case feminine plural respectively of G3778 (οὗτος); (to or with or by, etc.) these

G1342.def: from G1349 (δίκη); equitable (in character or act); by implication, innocent, holy (absolutely or relatively)

G717.def: of Hebrew origin (H02022 and H04023); Armageddon (or Har-Meggiddon), a symbolic name

G1747.def: feminine from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); an ambuscade, i.e. (figuratively) murderous purpose

G368.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G4483 (ῥέω); indisputable

G2973.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H07081); Cosam (i.e. Kosam) an Israelite

G5072.def: neuter of a compound of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G3376 (μήν); a four months' space

G2137.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G3598 (ὁδός); to help on the road, i.e. (passively) succeed in reaching; figuratively, to succeed in business affairs

G1214.def: probably for G1216 (Δημήτριος); Demas, a Christian

G986.def: perhaps the same as the base of G985 (βλαστάνω); Blastus, an officer of Herod Agrippa

G4402.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5525 (χορός); before the dance; Prochorus, a Christian

G5008.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H02924); the fresh, i.e. young girl; talitha (O maiden)

G1681.def: of foreign origin; Elymas, a wizard

G4176.def: middle voice of a derivative of G4177 (πολίτης); to behave as a citizen (figuratively)

G1298.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5015 (ταράσσω); to disturb wholly, i.e. agitate (with alarm)

G5137.def: probably from G5143 (τρέχω) (through the idea of mobility); the throat (neck), i.e. (figuratively) life

G4702.def: from G4703 (σπόρος); sown, i.e. (neuter plural) a planted field

G3118.def: from G3117 (μακρός) and G5550 (χρόνος); long-timed, i.e. long-lived

G5098.def: from G5097 (τιμωρέω); vindication, i.e. (by implication) a penalty

G3788.def: from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); the eye (literally or figuratively); by implication, vision; figuratively, envy (from the jealous side-glance)

G2868.def: from the base of G2867 (κονιάω) and ornumi (to "rouse"); pulverulence (as blown about)

G4755.def: from the base of G4756 (στρατιά) and G71 (ἄγω) or G2233 (ἡγέομαι); a general, i.e. (by implication or analogy) a (military) governor (prætor), the chief (præfect) of the (Levitical) temple-wardens

G3036.def: from a compound of G3037 (λίθος) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw stones, i.e. lapidate

G2003.def: from G2004 (ἐπιτάσσω); an injunction or decree; by implication, authoritativeness

G254.def: of uncertain derivation; a fetter or manacle

G2651.def: from G2596 (κατά) and accusative case plural feminine of G3441 (μόνος) (with G5561 (χώρα) implied); according to sole places, i.e. (adverbially) separately

G5270.def: from G5259 (ὑπό) and G2736 (κάτω); down under, i.e. beneath

G1183.def: from G1181 (δεκάτη); to tithe, i.e. to give or take a tenth

G1125.def: a primary verb; to "grave", especially to write; figuratively, to describe

G96.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1384 (δόκιμος); unapproved, i.e. rejected; by implication, worthless (literally or morally)

G4763.def: from a presumed derivative of G4764 (στρῆνος); to be luxurious

G4232.def: of Latin origin; the prætorium or governor's courtroom (sometimes including the whole edifice and camp)

G942.def: of uncertain derivation; a brier shrub

G2937.def: from G2936 (κτίζω); original formation (properly, the act; by implication, the thing, literally or figuratively)

G829.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and the base of G2237 (ἡδονή); self-pleasing, i.e. arrogant

G5052.def: from a compound of G5056 (τέλος) and G5342 (φέρω); to be a bearer to completion (maturity), i.e. to ripen fruit (figuratively)

G958.def: of Hebrew origin (H01144); Benjamin, an Israelite

G2015.def: from G2016 (ἐπιφανής); a manifestation, i.e. (specially) the advent of Christ (past or future)

G741.def: from a presumed derivative of G142 (αἴρω); to prepare, i.e. spice (with stimulating condiments)

G4960.def: from G4862 (σύν) and G4748 (στοιχέω); to file together (as soldiers in ranks), i.e. (figuratively) to correspond to

G1177.def: from G1176 (δέκα) and G1417 (δύο); two and ten, i.e. twelve

G765.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4576 (σέβομαι); irreverent, i.e. (by extension) impious or wicked

G3182.def: a prolonged (transitive) form of G3184 (μεθύω); to intoxicate

G3576.def: from a derivative of G3541 (νόθος); sluggish, i.e. (literally) lazy, or (figuratively) stupid

G4441.def: middle voice prolonged from a primary (which occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses); to question, i.e. ascertain by inquiry (as a matter of information merely; and thus differing from G2065 (ἐρωτάω), which properly means a request as a favor; and from G154 (αἰτέω), which is strictly a demand for something due; as well as from G2212 (ζητέω), which implies a search for something hidden; and from G1189 (δέομαι), which involves the idea of urgent need); by implication, to learn (by casual intelligence)

G2376.def: from G2374 (θύρα); an aperture, i.e. window

G381.def: from G303 (ἀνά) and G681 (ἅπτω); to enkindle

G3314.def: from G3319 (μέσος) and G2250 (ἡμέρα); midday; by implication, the south

G1372.def: from a variation of G1373 (δίψος); to thirst for (literally or figuratively)

G4445.def: from G4443 (πυρά); to be on fire, i.e. (specially), to have a fever

G5123.def: contraction for G5124 (τοῦτο) and G2076 (ἐστί); that is

G306.def: middle voice from G303 (ἀνά) and G906 (βάλλω); to put off (for oneself)

G5340.def: adverb from participle of G5339 (φείδομαι); abstemiously, i.e. stingily

G1383.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G1382 (δοκιμή); a testing; by implication, trustworthiness

G4271.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1212 (δῆλος); plain before all men, i.e. obvious

G1018.def: from the same as G1017 (βραβεῖον); to arbitrate, i.e. (genitive case) to govern (figuratively, prevail)

G430.def: middle voice from G303 (ἀνά) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold oneself up against, i.e. (figuratively) put up with

G215.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2980 (λαλέω); unspeakable

G64.def: from G61 (ἄγρα); to hunt, i.e. (figuratively) to entrap

G4129.def: from another form of G4128 (πλῆθος); to increase (transitively or intransitively)

G3080.def: from G3089 (λύω); a loosening, i.e. (specially), divorce

G153.def: from (disfigurement, i.e. disgrace); to feel shame (for oneself)

G479.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G2564 (καλέω); to invite in return

G4494.def: from a derivative of G4496 (ῥίπτω) (meaning a fan or bellows); to breeze up, i.e. (by analogy) to agitate (into waves)

G279.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G3340 (μετανοέω); unrepentant

G910.def: from G907 (βαπτίζω); a baptizer, as an epithet of Christ's forerunner

G352.def: from G303 (ἀνά) (in the sense of reversal) and G2955 (κύπτω); to unbend, i.e. rise; figuratively, be elated

G5412.def: from G5414 (φόρτος); to load up (properly, as a vessel or animal), i.e. (figuratively) to overburden with ceremony (or spiritual anxiety)

G370.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G514 (ἄξιος); unfit

G5353.def: from G5350 (φθέγγομαι); utterance, i.e. a musical note (vocal or instrumental)

G1731.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1166 (δεικνύω); to indicate (by word or act)

G5070.def: from the multiplicative adverb of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G5507 (χίλιοι); four times a thousand

G489.def: from a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G3408 (μισθός); requital, correspondence
